title: AN ACT AMENDING ITEM NUMBERED EIGHTY-SIX, UNDER "CAMARINES SUR II," APPENDIX B OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 6720 / 53 OG No. 17, 5520 (September 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1776, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT AMENDING ITEM NUMBERED EIGHTY-SIX, UNDER "CAMARINES SUR II," APPENDIX B OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item numbered eighty-six, under "Camarines Sur II," appendix B of Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred thirteen, is amended to read as follows:

"86. Tandoc, Siruma Construction of one room ............................ P 4,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
